title: NANA Elects 2022 Board Officers
summary: NANA board officers are elected every year. At its board meeting on April 27, 2022, the board elected the following officers: Ely Utuktauraq Cyrus, Chair Linda Piquk Lee, First Vice Chair Charlie Alasuk Curtis, Second Vice Chair Bonita Qanailaaq Barr, Treasurer Gladys Ikkaiyuk Jones, Secretary The 2...

title: NRC Shareholder Trust Announces Spring 2022 Dividend Distribution
summary: On April 27, 2022, the NANA Regional Corporation, Inc. Board of Directors authorized a contribution to the NRC Shareholder Trust for the purpose of paying a spring dividend to Trust beneficiaries of $6.00 per share, for a total distribution for dividends of approximately $10.8 million.
